login.brandHeadline: Welcome back. Your pipeline picks up where you left off.
login.brandSub: Sign in to manage applications, roles, and matches in one polished workspace.
login.brandBullet1: Single sign-in for student and employer experiences
login.brandBullet2: Aligned with how modern career platforms should feel
login.adminAccessNotice: Admin access is issued by your organization.

register.brandHeadline: Create your profile and start matching with intention.
register.brandSub: A refined onboarding flow: verify your email, then land in a workspace built for hiring and careers.
register.brandBullet1: Email verification keeps your account trustworthy
register.brandBullet2: Tailored fields for students and employers
register.brandBullet3: You are minutes away from a cleaner hiring loop
register.pasteCodeHint: Paste the code from your inbox. Codes expire shortly.
register.checkSpamHint: If you do not see it, check spam or promotions.
register.fairUseNotice: By continuing you agree to fair use and accurate profile information.

forgot.brandSub: Verify your email, confirm the code, and set a fresh password—clear steps, no clutter.
forgot.brandBullet2: Matches the account type you use to sign in
forgot.brandBullet3: You will return to sign-in when complete
forgot.emailStepSubtitle: Choose your account type, then we will email a verification code.
forgot.passwordStepSubtitle: Create a strong new password to secure your workspace.
